name: Claude 2
tagline: Second-generation Claude with a 100K context window and improved coding/reasoning.
metaDescription: Claude 2 (Anthropic), released 2023-07-11 — part of the Claude (legacy 1–2.x) line. Second-generation Claude with a 100K context window and improved coding/rea…
overview: Claude 2 is a large language model from Anthropic, part of the Claude (legacy 1–2.x) line. Released 2023-07-11. Anthropic's pre-Claude-3 models, including the original Claude and the low-latency Claude Instant; all retired.
What's notable in this version: Second-generation Claude with a 100K context window and improved coding/reasoning. Retired 2025-07-21.
